D:\trae-bz\TraeProjects\33\tcc\tcc.exe CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/examples/host_demo.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/memory.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/value.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/object.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/chunk.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/table.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/lexer.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/compiler.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/vm.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/gc.c.obj CMakeFiles/host_demo.dir/src/host.c.obj -o host_demo.exe
